text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross enters scrimmage after scrimmage,
working hard to refine the lightning within.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
A'ight, I'm right on their tails. Now I just gotta
wait till the timing's juuust right...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now! Grrraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her racing style is slowly starting to take form,
when one day...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh! What's up, squirt? Anythin' new?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Whatcha cryin' for?! C'mon, calm down
now. So what's goin' on?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mom's... not movin'? And she looks different from
when she's sleepin'?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Where's Dad? If you can't reach him, call an
ambulance! Or find a grown-up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We cancel the day's training and anxiously await
more news from her family...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Trainer, sorry 'bout training today...
choice_data_list: Never mind that. How's your mom?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She said she's feelin' stable enough. Apparently,
her stomach was twistin' 'n turnin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The doctor said she's gonna be fine, but I wonder,
y'know...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's not... gonna get worse, right? I... I...
choice_data_list: If the doctor said she'll be fine, she'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do my best to reassure her. If her mom's
condition has stabilized, there shouldn't be
anything to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm more worried about Tamamo Cross. I've never
seen her eyes look so anxious... so vulnerable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Along with the rest of her family, Tamamo Cross's
mother means the world to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Two days later, on the day of the scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder how mom's doin'... She's probably
nappin' 'bout now.)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, I can't keep worryin' like this! Focus, focus!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No... When did they get me surrounded?! Tch, get
your head back in the game, ya dummy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Aha! An opening! Time put the pedal to the
metal!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa! Watch out!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tumble, tumble, crashhh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Aaaaargh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It all happens in an instant. The Umamusume in
front of Tamamo Cross crash into one another,
taking her down with them as they fall head over
heels.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps if Tamamo Cross was completely focused
on the race, she could've swerved out of the way.
However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wee woo, wee woo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other trainers and I spring into action and get
all the racers medical attention. Luckily, no one
has any serious physical injuries... but the same
can't be said of their spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross herself was hit hard. After being
given the green light to talk to her, I rush over to
check she's okay.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah, stop! Don't come near me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you, Trainer... Sorry 'bout that...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That race... It's over now, right? All those bodies... crashin' into each so fast... I... We...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Look... I think I need some space for a while...
Sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm told she has full-body contusions. Basically,
she took a beating, and she's got the bruises to
show for it. It'll take some time for her to recover.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her body isn't the only thing that got
bruised...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: (This is my chance! Go, go, gooo! I gotta go now!)

text_block_list.name: Racing Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Urk!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I really am, Trainer. I knew I had to go.
I knew I needed to make that push.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I knew, but... I couldn't move. My legs just
wouldn't budge... so I ended up takin' the long
way around...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But that slowed me down too much. I knew I
wasn't gonna make it, but then I remembered
what happened before...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. It's not like that kinda thing happens
often. I know that, but... I just... Urk...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My legs won't budge no matter how much I
scream at them to freakin' MOVE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The collision has stricken fear into her heart and
reduced the lightning she once boasted to a
humble spark.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No doubt her worries regarding her family are
what distracted Tamamo Cross. Her judgment was
only delayed by a moment, but the lasting
consequences are bearing down heavily on her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, every race she enters for the time
being is going to wear away more and more of her
energy.
